title: US-Iran war: Why India is facing an LPG crisis — explained in charts
content: India grapples with a severe cooking gas shortage, driven by Middle East conflict-induced import disruptions. Long queues and panic buying plague cities as supply chains strain. The government is prioritising household needs, cutting industrial allocations, while seeking to restore commercial supplies and urging a shift to alternatives like piped natural gas.

title: West Bengal polls: RG Kar victim’s mother Ratna Debnath gets BJP ticket from Panihati
content: The BJP has nominated Ratna Debnath, mother of the RG Kar Medical College rape and murder victim, from Panihati for the West Bengal Assembly elections. Her decision to contest on a BJP ticket stems from her pursuit of justice for her daughter and a broader fight for women's safety. This move has sparked debate among activists.

title: Hormuz is a trailer. Malacca is China’s real nightmare — and India knows it
content: The Strait of Hormuz crisis highlights global maritime vulnerabilities. For China, the Strait of Malacca presents a similar, long-term strategic risk. India's Andaman and Nicobar Islands offer proximity and surveillance capabilities, providing significant leverage. This geographical advantage allows India to create uncertainty and pressure, impacting China's vital trade and energy lifelines.

title: Meta Biggest-ever layoffs may start soon: HR sends this email to employees
content: Meta is preparing for its largest-ever round of layoffs, with employees in wearables and ads told to work from home as cuts loom. Reuters reported the reductions could affect 20% of its nearly 79,000-strong workforce—around 15,800 jobs. The move is driven by Meta's $600 billion AI infrastructure commitment and a broader push toward leaner, AI-assisted operations, compounded by setbacks with its in-house AI models.

title: 'Playoffs isn't enough': LSG owner lays down marker for Pant to earn 'respect'
content: Goenka said the franchise is still shaping its identity and that success in the league is measured by trophies rather than consistency alone.

title: Assam poll SWOT analysis: Hold or flip for Himanta vs Gogoi?
content: Assam's political landscape is heating up alongside spring festivities, with the BJP aiming for a solo majority against a resurgent Congress. Key contests include Himanta Biswa Sarma versus Gaurav Gogoi, while issues like identity, infiltration, and development shape the electoral battleground. Post-delimitation changes add another layer to this defining election.

title: What's inside Trump's 15-point plan to end war with Iran?
content: The United States has proposed a 15-point plan to end the war with Iran, even as Tehran has denied any formal talks. The conflict, which began on February 28, has caused heavy casualties and disrupted global markets. The plan outlines a ceasefire and key conditions, but there is no official confirmation yet. Iran has rejected US claims of negotiations and set its own conditions, including recognition of its rights, reparations and security guarantees, while also seeking sanctions relief and other measures.

title: Injury-hit KKR name this Indian pacer as Harshit Rana's replacement for IPL
content: Rana, who sustained a ligament strain in his right knee injury during India's T20 World Cup warm-up match against South Africa, is currently undergoing rehabilitation.

title: How US-Iran war may have proved ex-Google CEO was right on advising US Army on drones
content: The US-Iran conflict showcases the dominance of low-cost drones in aerial warfare. Iran is deploying thousands of affordable drones, challenging expensive legacy military hardware. These drones overwhelm air defenses and strike sensitive targets, demonstrating a new era of warfare. This shift emphasizes economic efficiency and tactical agility in modern combat scenarios.

title: Keralam CM Pinarayi Vijayan slams UDF leader A Irshad's 'beauty' remark on MLA Pratibha
content: Keralam Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan has strongly condemned misogynistic remarks made by a UDF leader against MLA U Prathibha, terming them an insult to all women in public life. Prathibha plans legal action, stating the comments were beyond character assassination and aimed at discouraging women. The UDF candidate distanced himself from the remarks.

title: England cricket explodes: ECB hits back at batter's 'no one cares' claim
content: Livingstone, who has not played international cricket since England’s winless campaign in the ICC Champions Trophy under former captain Jos Buttler, had told ESPNCricinfo that the management, including Key and head coach Brendon McCullum, did not show enough concern for players once they were dropped.

title: All-party meet on Middle East: Opposition backs govt steps in crisis, says Rijiju
content: Opposition parties pledged full support to the government on the Middle East crisis following an all-party meeting. Ministers addressed concerns regarding the Iran-Israel-US conflict's impact on India, including energy supplies and citizen safety. While most parties expressed satisfaction, some, like the TMC, skipped the meeting, and a few voiced lingering concerns about parliamentary debate.

title: Facing racism in Indian dressing room, how Sivaramakrishnan found comfort in WI
content: Sivaramakrishnan, who played 25 international matches for India, made his Test debut in Antigua in April 1983 at the age of 17 years and 118 days, becoming one of the youngest to represent the country in the format.

title: Abhishek Bachchan's physical transformation shocks the internet, netizens think it's for 'King'
content: Abhishek Bachchan is filming Shah Rukh Khan's 'King'. He is reportedly playing a negative role. A recent picture shows Abhishek with a new muscular physique. This transformation has surprised fans and social media users. Many have commented positively on his new look. The actor is keeping details about his role private.

title: 'Fashion is no joke': Russell Wilson’s wife Ciara attends Fashion Scholarship Fund Gala with family
content: Russell Wilson and Ciara were honored at the Fashion Scholarship Fund’s 89th Annual Gala in New York City. They attended the event with their eldest children, Sienna and Future. The NFL power couple were dressed in coordinated beige and white ensembles. The event aimed to celebrate fashion scholars and industry leaders. Ciara gave a compelling acceptance speech. Wilson did too. As for his future, analysts are linking him to the New York Jets.

title: War-hit schedule sees Iran's Tractor travel to Saudi for ACL quarterfinal berth
content: Iran’s Tractor FC will travel to Saudi Arabia to face Shabab Al Ahli in a playoff. The winner will move into the quarterfinals of the Asian Champions League Elite, where they will meet Buriram United.

title: Shiffrin wins record-equalling sixth Grand Crystal Globe after Milano Cortina 2026
content: Olympic champion Mikaela Shiffrin ended the 2025-26 Alpine Skiing World Cup season on a historic note. The American star secured her sixth overall Crystal Globe title after finishing 11th in the women’s giant slalom at the World Cup Finals in Lillehammer. Her consistent performances throughout the season helped her collect 1,410 points. This placed her ahead of Germany’s Emma Aicher, who finished second overall with 1,323 points after a crucial final race.

title: Sonia Gandhi in hospital: Doctors say veteran Congress leader to remain under observation
content: Veteran Congress leader Sonia Gandhi is stable and under observation at Sir Ganga Ram Hospital after being admitted Tuesday night due to feeling unwell following a weather change. Doctors are conducting investigations for potential stomach and urinary tract infections, with antibiotics administered as part of her treatment.  Her condition is being closely monitored by a medical team.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ box office day 7 live: Ranveer Singh starrer chases Rs 700 cr
content: 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' featuring Ranveer Singh and directed by Aditya Dhar has cemented its status as an all-time blockbuster, crossing the monumental Rs. 900 crore gross milestone worldwide in its first week. Despite a massive 3-hour and 49-minute runtime, the espionage thriller has maintained an iron grip on the domestic market, fueled by strong word-of-mouth and festive boosts from Ugadi and Gudi Padwa. From its record-breaking Rs. 114.85 crore peak on Day 4 to its current global gross of Rs. 919 crore, 'Dhurandhar 2' continues to shatter records as the fastest Indian film to breach the Rs. 500 crore mark.

title: Majority view US strikes on Iran as excessive; gas price fears rise: Poll
content: A new poll reveals a majority of Americans believe recent US military actions against Iran have gone too far, despite growing concerns over rising fuel costs. While preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons is a key objective, most oppose further escalation, including ground forces, as the US deploys additional troops to the Middle East.

title: Samuthirakani responds to viral Vijay-Trisha remarks, says it was concern, not criticism
content: Actor Samuthirakani addresses a viral video controversy. He explains his remarks about Vijay and Trisha were taken out of context. Samuthirakani insists his words came from genuine concern and emotion. He maintains he speaks honestly and has no regrets about his statements. The actor clarifies his perspective on public appearances.

title: ‘No shortage of fuel’: Centre assures LPG, diesel and petrol supply; pushes PNG, kerosene
content: Centre on Wednesday said there was no shortage of LPG, petrol or diesel in the country and urged people not to panic amid reports of increased demand in some areas. Officials said PNG supply was being prioritised and CNG was fully available for transport. The government also highlighted enforcement action against hoarding, with thousands of raids conducted and cylinders seized, while additional kerosene allocations have been made as an alternative fuel.

title: 'Talking bulls**t' about Arjun Tendulkar': Yuvraj Singh's father blasts R Ashwin
content: R Ashwin’s claim that Arjun Tendulkar won’t feature for Lucknow Super Giants in IPL 2026 due to strong competition has sparked controversy. Yograj Singh hit back sharply, calling his remarks “bulls**t” and questioning his authority. He defended Arjun’s potential, highlighting past issues and boldly claiming he could transform him into a top batter within six months.

title: 'Finally': Dutch No. 1 Anish Giri jabs FIDE over unusual Cyprus safety post
content: Concerns over safety and infrastructure in Cyprus ahead of the Candidates have unsettled players, with Koneru Humpy withdrawing and Hikaru Nakamura questioning power reliability. Anish Giri mocked FIDE’s delayed response. FIDE has now issued a FAQ, insisting Cyprus is safe, outages are rare, and backup systems and contingency plans are in place to ensure smooth conduct.

title: Happy Ram Navami 2026: Top 50 wishes, messages and quotes to share with your family and friends
content: Ram Navami, celebrating Lord Ram's birth, is a significant Hindu festival observed on the ninth day of Chaitra month. In 2026, it falls on March 27th, marked by fasting, temple visits, and devotional practices. The festival symbolizes victory over evil and upholds truth and dharma, offering a time to connect with loved ones through heartfelt wishes and messages.

title: Bank holiday on Ram Navmi: Are banks open or closed on March 26 & 27
content: Bank customers must check holiday schedules before visiting branches this week. Closures will occur due to festivals and state holidays.  RBI guidelines also mean branches will be shut on the second and fourth Saturdays of March.  Plan your banking needs accordingly. Digital platforms like mobile apps and UPI remain active for everyday transactions.  Services requiring branch visits will be unavailable.

title: Indian universities clock record gains in QS subject rankings 2026
content: India has made significant strides in the QS World University Rankings by Subject 2026, with 99 institutions featuring 599 times across 55 disciplines. Forty-four percent of entries improved, the highest among large systems, while 120 are new. IIT Bombay and IIT Delhi entered the top 50 in Computer Science, and AIIMS reached its highest-ever Medicine ranking (105th). Business, engineering, and emerging disciplines show notable growth, while Arts & Humanities remain the weakest area, highlighting India’s expanding but uneven global higher education presence.

title: Barred by interim govt, BCB now wants Hasina-linked cricketer back for 'long term'
content: Shakib, 39, had moved to the United States after the country's Awami League government led by Sheikh Hasina was removed following a student uprising in 2024. The interim government had barred Shakib from representing Bangladesh

title: Pakistan train derailment: 25 injured as Tezgam Express coaches go off track
content: A train derailment in Pakistan's Punjab province has left at least 25 people injured. Seven coaches of the Tezgam Express went off the tracks near Lodhran on late Tuesday night. Rescue teams quickly responded to the scene. Authorities are investigating the cause, with human error and mechanical issues being considered

title: US deploys 2,000 paratroopers from ‘Immediate Response Force’ to Middle East: Report
content: Around 2,000 elite paratroopers are heading to the Middle East, bolstering US military options as President Trump explores diplomatic avenues with Iran. This deployment, alongside thousands of Marines, signals a significant escalation. The troops could be positioned for operations near Iran's oil hub, Kharg Island, or to secure vital shipping lanes.

title: 'Historic step': After Uttarakhand, Gujarat passes Uniform Civil Code Bill
content: Gujarat has passed its Uniform Civil Code Bill, 2026. This makes it the second Indian state to adopt a unified law for marriage, divorce, and inheritance. Union Home Minister Amit Shah hailed it as a historic step for equality. Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel stated the UCC will ensure equal rights and dignity for women across all communities.

title: Inside R Madhavan’s homes: Rs 17.5 cr Mumbai flat, Chennai bungalow, Dubai house
content: Actor R. Madhavan's impressive real estate portfolio, spanning Mumbai, Chennai, and Dubai, showcases a blend of luxury and purpose.  His homes, valued in crores, feature serene interiors, meditation spaces, and even hydroponic gardens, reflecting a life of comfort and sophisticated calm.  These properties underscore his strong financial standing, built on successful film projects and endorsements.

title: Born without arms or legs: What this 43-year-old man did to become inspiration for millions
content: Born without arms or legs in 1982, Nick Vujicic defied expectations to become a globally renowned motivational speaker. His message, forged through early struggles with bullying and isolation, emphasizes endurance, faith, and the persistent choice to keep going, transforming personal hardship into a powerful public mission.

title: 60 m barrels of Russian crude booked by Indian refiners amid global supply strain
content: Indian refiners have significantly increased purchases of Russian crude, securing around 60 million barrels for the upcoming month amidst Middle East conflict-driven supply disruptions. This surge is supported by a US waiver allowing imports of Russian oil loaded before March 12, with refiners also diversifying with Venezuelan and previously Iranian crude.

title: When is Ram Navami: March 26 or 27? Check correct date
content: Ram Navami, celebrating the birth of Lord Shri Ram, the seventh incarnation of Lord Vishnu, will be observed on March 26, 2026. This prominent Hindu festival marks the end of Chaitra Navratri and is celebrated with prayers, recitations of Ramacharitmanas, and acts of charity, including Kanya Pujan.

title: Parliament will function until April 2; Lok Sabha starts debate on amendments to insolvency & bankruptcy law
content: Parliamentary Affairs Minister Kiren Rijiju says that though there was a proposal to hold sittings during the weekend, Parliament will not function on March 28 and March 29; March 31 will be a holiday because of Mahavir Jayanti

title: BJP’s emphasis on peace and development has led to optimism, says CM Sarma
content: At a rally in Hojai, central Assam, Himanta Biswa Sarma promised two lakh government jobs for the youth over the next five years

title: Two member from National Council for Transgender Persons resign, citing ‘regressive’ Amendment Bill
content: Southern representative Kalki Subramaniam and North East representative Rituparna Neog called the amendment Bill “a step backward for our fundamental rights to self-identification and dignity”

title: Questions on caste to be notified before second phase of Census 2027: Government
content: Questions will be finalised on the basis of inputs and suggestions received from different ministries, departments, organisations, Census data users, etc., before each Census

title: Private member bill seeks to establish central optical devices quality control and vision care regulation
content: The proposed bill seeks to offer remedy to the alleged vulnerability of consumers who according to the bill are in a “no-man’s land” between the manufacture of a lens and its delivery

title: Karnataka better placed than its progressive neighbour in fiscal deficit: Siddaramaiah
content: Debt is on higher side in every developed economy. However, one should see if loan has been utilised for the welfare of the people, says the Chief Minister

title: A.P. CM unveils roadmap to diversify tourism options; panel to fast-track projects
content: Naidu instructs officials to rapidly scale up infrastructure in line with the rising influx of tourists; target set to ready 50,000 hotel rooms and 10,000 homestays by 2029

title: China border patrols went up significantly post Galwan clash, data shows
content: From 173 patrols per month in 2017-18, the ITBP has ramped up the number of patrols to around 500 in 2023-24; the data was reported in the Union Home Ministry’s annual report for 2024-25 which was published on Wednesday

title: POCSO survivors forced to approach authorities repeatedly to get compensation: panel
content: Child rights panel report calls for interventions at government level to find funds for paying victim compensation

title: AIADMK-led alliance will win 210 seats, says Palaniswami
content: Launching his campaign in Mylapore, AIADMK leader says NDA will form the government with an absolute majority; accuses DMK of not fulfilling poll promises and failing on law and order front

title: Neutral parties gain traction in Assam fight between two blocs
content: The “non-aligned” entities include All India United Democratic Front, United People’s Party Liberation, and All India Trinamool Congress

title: A.P. govt. approves SOP for drinking water quality monitoring in ULBs
content: The initiative mandates compliance with BIS IS 10500:2012 standards and focuses on early detection of contamination, timely response, and improved public health outcomes

title: Assembly Elections LIVE: ECI hikes remuneration for poll officials ahead of Assembly elections in 5 States
content: The daily allowance for presiding officers has been increased from ₹350 earlier to ₹500 per day, or a total of ₹2,000 for the assignment, Election Commission official said

title: CJI takes exception to litigant’s father calling up his brother
content: The court was hearing a petition filed by Nikhil Kumar Punia, who is seeking minority reservation in medical admissions after converting to Buddhism

title: Excommunicating members for marrying outside Church violates their constitutional rights: Kerala HC
content: HC says the practice of endogamy among members of the Knanaya Catholic community is not an essential religious practice

title: UDAN revamp: Centre extends subsidy to five years, shifts funding to exchequer
content: The revamp comes as more than 90% of routes under the old scheme fell into disuse after the subsidy period; the ₹28,840 crore outlay of the modified scheme marks a nearly six-fold jump in funding

title: A.P. Police arrest three more terror suspects from three States
content: The police team arrests Sayeeda Begum from Hyderabad in Telangana, Abdul Salam from Ballari in Karnataka and 19-year-old Zeeshan from Jodhpur in Rajasthan

title: Office commute times nearly identical in Bengaluru, Hyderabad: report
content: Data from MoveInSync indicates that the average one-way commute is about 59 minutes in Bengaluru and 58 minutes in Hyderabad, suggesting similar overall travel burdens

title: Election officials seize air gun, pellets, unaccounted cash in Vellore and nearby districts
content: An air gun was seized when members of a surveillance team intercepted a car for a vehicle check in Vellore

title: BRO has key role in building frontier infrastructure, national security: Defence Minister
content: The BRO has facilitated the mobility of the military and transformed the lives of border residents, the minister said

title: A.P. govt. signs MoU to promote culinary tourism
content: The tie-up with Indian Culinary Institute aims to promote Telugu cuisine on national and international platforms, and focus on skill development in the culinary sector

title: Deputy CM Pawan Kalyan virtually inaugurates ‘Giri Pradakshina’ path at Ramateertham temple
content: It has been laid at a cost of ₹3.40 crore provided from the VB-G RAM G funds; the NDA government has provided road connectivity to 22 major temples in the last 20 months at a cost of ₹40 crore drawn out of VB-G RAM G, Panchayat Raj and SASCI funds, he says

title: 'India belongs to its people, not a select few': Rahul meets tribal leaders opposing Great Nicobar project
content: “As I listened to them, one thing became immediately clear: their frustration is not just about a ‘project’. This is about people, their identity, and their right to live with dignity on their own land,” Mr. Gandhi said.

title: 30,075 poor kids allotted free seats in private schools under RTE Act
content: The selected students must confirm their admissions by visiting the allotted schools between March 26 and April 7, says Samagra Shiksha State Project Director

title: March Madness 2026: Bilas' path to the men's Final Four for every Sweet 16 team
content: This tournament has given us basketball at its best. Here's what to expect from a Sweet 16 that will be just as electric.

title: NBA votes to mull Vegas, Seattle expansion bids
content: The NBA's board of governors has approved a vote for the league to explore bids and applicants for expansion teams exclusively in Las Vegas and Seattle.

title: KU's Self denies retirement rumors as 'bad info'
content: Kansas coach Bill Self denied rumors that he is planning to retire, telling the Kansas City Star that he remains undecided on his future with the Jayhawks.

title: Flacco: Teams 'dumb' for not signing me to start
content: Joe Flacco is back with the Bengals as Joe Burrow's backup, but he isn't shy about voicing his belief that teams made a mistake by passing on him to be their starting quarterback.

title: LIV sued by distillery for trademark infringement
content: A Long Island-based distillery sued LIV Golf in federal court on Monday, alleging the golf league's use of "LIV" branding for alcoholic beverages and apparel infringes on its registered trademark.

title: Butler names ex-Bulldogs player Nored as coach
content: Butler has named former Bulldogs player Ronald Nored to succeed Thad Matta as head coach, the school announced Wednesday.

title: Yanks' Cole to start season on 15-day IL, not 60
content: Yankees ace Gerrit Cole was placed on the 15-day injured list before Wednesday's season opener against San Francisco rather than the 60-day IL.

title: UNC fires coach Davis after early tourney exit
content: North Carolina men's basketball coach Hubert Davis was fired by the school after another early exit in the NCAA tournament.

title: Shiffrin wins record-tying 6th World Cup title
content: Skier Mikaela Shiffrin held off a challenge from Germany's Emma Aicher to win a record-tying sixth women's overall World Cup skiing title on Wednesday in Norway.

title: ⚾ Fantasy baseball draft guide: Rankings, more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

title: Predicting the 2026 MLB season, from the playoffs and World Series to MVP and Cy Young
content: Can the Dodgers three-peat? Will Skubal and Skenes win another Cy Young? Our experts make their predictions for the 2026 baseball season.

title: Who's next at UNC? Potential candidates to replace Hubert Davis, their priorities

content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

title: Ranking Ohio State's first-round receivers since 2022: How does Carnell Tate stack up?
content: Tate could be the WR1 of the 2026 draft. But how does he compare to Jaxon Smith-Njigba, among others?

title: NBA playoff watch: Is Thunder-Celtics a Finals preview?
content: The past two champs meet in a possible June preview. Plus, playoff projections and draft lottery standings.

title: 'The epitome of Texas basketball': These are Rori Harmon's Longhorns
content: The Texas point guard has played five seasons while under constant pressure from her coach, Vic Schaefer. It has made both of them better.

title: Ranking the remaining 16 teams in the women's NCAA tournament
content: Six SEC teams and five from the ACC (including a 10-seed!) make up the Sweet 16. Here's how they stack up.

title: Forget Ronaldo, Rooney or Henry: Salah is the Premier League's greatest-ever player
content: Cristiano Ronaldo has five Ballon d'Ors and Thierry Henry will forever be an "Invincible," but neither had a Premier League career to match Mohamed Salah's.

title: Cost of the World Cup: How much might a USMNT fan spend to follow their team?
content: From tickets to hotels, how expensive is this summer's big event? Let's find out -- through the eyes of a USMNT fan on the trip of a lifetime.

title: World Cup playoff preview, predictions: Who will book the final six spots?
content: The final six spots -- four from Europe and two from the intercontinental playoff -- will be clinched this week.

title: What's next for Florida, Kansas, Kentucky, UNC: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: UConn star Azzi Fudd and the family behind her final March
content: Azzi Fudd's "imperfectly perfect" family has been her rock through ACL tears, dog food pranks and Beyoncé on repeat. Now they're hoping for one more NCAA tournament title for UConn.

title: NHL playoff watch: Projecting the Sabres' first-round opponent
content: Wednesday's matchup against Boston could be repeated in April. Plus, updated playoff projections after Tuesday's massive slate.

title: How the new WNBA CBA will impact every player's salary in 2026
content: A'ja Wilson will likely get the $1.4 million supermax, while Caitlin Clark's rookie contract will pay over $500,000.

title: Arsenal teach Chelsea a Champions League lesson in clinical finishing
content: Arsenal will head into the second leg of their UWCL quarterfinal against Chelsea with a commanding 3-1 lead thanks to some lethal finishing from Stina Blackstenius, Chloe Kelly and Alessia Russo.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: Angel City, Dash on the rise but Thorns still on top
content: Angel City and the Houston Dash are quickly making their way to the top of ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, but their rise isn't enough to make them No. 1.

content: How to bet on top-2 seeds Purdue, Houston and Duke in Thursday's and Friday's regional semifinal games.

content: Amid a wave of complaints from F1's four-time world champion Max Verstappen, ESPN's Nate Saunders examines every one and gives his verdict on if they are warranted.

content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

content: Sitalkuchi would have been another dot on the map of West Bengal, but for the tragic events of April 10, 2021.
